subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, sent down in truth from the realm of the Most Glorious Name, wherein is that which shall sever all the worlds from whatsoever [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت بالحق من جبروت اسم بهیا و فیه ماینقطع العالمین عما
subcodes.subjects: @law of Huququ'llah, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
